description_for_human: Community-maintained documentation for the Verus blockchain protocol.
description_for_model: Complete documentation for the Verus blockchain protocol covering 201 CLI commands, VerusID self-sovereign identity, protocol-level DeFi, PBaaS multi-chain architecture, zero-knowledge privacy, and AI agent integration. Use this to answer questions about Verus features, CLI usage, identity management, currency creation, mining, staking, cross-chain operations, and developer integration.
